new_value: {"notes":"2026-07-16 linkage validation: removed redundant explicit CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_STM32WL pins from gateway/puck Nucleo board configs so the Kconfig choice follows the active driver. Clean Renode builds pass and resolve CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_RENODE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_RENODE=y, and STM32WL driver/model unset. Renode ELF/config SHA-256: lora_ping 263f9f59f85f91173aa0e1aadf9baf4084316e983fd9b1a7821bd83f86a20075 / a0b08c5b0ae3ab09fc12cb2cf175e7fc46ffb90f9d8e7d9bcb6a4e64170eea09; gateway bfd47c1311f95e5fddb6b59ffc752955944a7e9757f6aab326db3724eb1f1294 / 8725fd1da2f5939b71223287b5b22479c899d6642362eca3888e010112cb1907; puck ab5492e7db34cf6c3a01c4ffeeb45887b2bb90f45995abecf3b1d4fad2d9dafc / 7bd4e01e19cdc072a5b53039a4d43d4dc2997146a8670bd65724ebda63a930d8. Fresh lora_ping runtime booted, logged TX done, and simulator independently observed one 4-byte transmission. Clean physical gateway/puck builds pass and resolve CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_STM32WL=y with Renode unset: gateway ELF/config 3afbb140e9dbfb30dea62c1a0a237f68ae4d563a23cc2af9660c9ebf8c9d1382 / 6feba36502fb357713240c9a0289621de205719079b1f83f00bad36100fa05d8; puck 2d29da38483a02f2ceb750c5a8795b04291fda5cb46aa612fffa30886d76b659 / 1adf6bbc3b62a99b29b031eb1f138c5049030c653ec28f20d88dbc754a6f05ee. Three independent scoped code reviews found no defects. Full-app late runtime/radio acceptance remains blocked on project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.8."}

new_value: {"notes":"Completed after dependencies: RNG model unblocked full apps. Gateway reaches full L2 startup and CoAP AUTOSTART; puck reaches main, arms 4000 ms watchdog, enters L2/CoAP mode, and produces four simulator-observed transmissions; lora_ping independently produces one 4-byte TX. Clean physical gateway/puck builds retain STM32WL model. Runtime logs and artifact hashes are recorded in linked project-LICHEN-5ix1.5 and project-LICHEN-oqv7.8 notes."}
Canonical gateway/puck link and reach late runtime markers; simulator radio effects, lora_ping regression, and physical config isolation verified.
